overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hunter character in a long coat and tricorn hat exploring a foggy, gothic Victorian city at night. The character walks through wet cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps, passing between historic buildings and approaching a large cathedral complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cobblestone street between gothic buildings

agents.ego_description: character in long coat walking steadily down the foggy street, passing a bright street lamp on the left

entered.detail: tall cast-iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light through the fog
black iron fence running along the right side of the street
large dark stone cathedral with spires and illuminated windows in the distance
multi-story brick building with gothic architectural details
tall modern tower with lit windows rising behind the cathedral

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, narrow cobblestone street at night. A Victorian street lamp casts a warm glow on the left while a wrought iron fence lines the right. In the distance, a massive gothic cathedral looms beneath tall art deco towers. The character walks steadily forward through the mist.

events.description: narrow street opens into wider plaza area with central tree and cathedral view
moving away from direct street lamp into more diffused ambient lighting from distant windows

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the plaza toward the large cathedral building, passing a tree on the right

entered.detail: single leafy tree standing in the cobblestone plaza
open paved area reflecting the ambient light

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide cobblestone plaza. The street lamp and iron fence fall behind as a deciduous tree comes into view on the right. The gothic cathedral shifts to the left side of the frame as the character approaches, with the ground transitioning from street to open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: inclined street leading to stone archway

events.description: character turns right toward a stone archway entrance
street surface begins to incline upward toward the gated entrance

agents.ego_description: turning right and ascending the inclined cobblestone street toward the illuminated stone archway

entered.detail: gothic stone archway with iron gates, entrance to the building complex
series of matching Victorian lamps lining the ascending path

segments.scene_description: The character turns right toward a prominent stone archway entrance. The street inclines upward, lined with a row of street lamps leading to the gate. The tree and previous buildings fall away as the character ascends toward the archway, with the gothic cathedral now visible to the left in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, foggy street that gradually opens into a wide plaza before ascending toward a grand stone entrance. It begins on a wet cobblestone path where a warm street lamp and a wrought iron fence frame the character's steady advance toward a distant gothic cathedral. As the character moves forward, the narrow street expands into a broad plaza, shifting the cathedral to the left of the frame while a deciduous tree emerges on the right. The scene then transitions as the character turns right, leaving the open plaza behind to follow an upward incline lined with a row of glowing lamps. Finally, the camera ascends the slope toward a prominent stone archway, with the massive cathedral remaining visible in the background to the left.
